---
title: "Life Expectancy and GDP per Capita"
---

This page explores the relationship between life expectancy and GDP per capita over time using the Gapminder dataset.

```{python}

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Load data
df = pd.read_csv("gapminder.csv")

# Scatter plot
plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))
plt.scatter(df['gdp_per_capita'], df['life_expectancy'], alpha=0.5)
plt.xscale('log')  # Better visualization
plt.xlabel("GDP per Capita (log scale)")
plt.ylabel("Life Expectancy")
plt.title("Life Expectancy vs GDP per Capita")
plt.show()
```
